_meta.purpose: Canonical exclude-list of OPERATOR x402 payer wallets (self-settle harness / dev). The agent-funnel quota->paid DISTINCT-WALLET conversion metric AND the x402 census (/dashboard/funnel, operator-only) MUST exclude these, so the funnel measures REAL agent conversion and not operator self-settle. All 7 pre-instrumentation processed_x402_payments rows (2026-06-30 14:45-14:57 UTC) resolved on-chain (Base USDC AuthorizationUsed) to the single harness buyer below.
_meta.rule_cite: OPS-X402-WALLET-ATTRIBUTION-W1 R4 + Q2 + CLAUDE.md '## Data Integrity (THE LAW)' (Tier-tagged DB rows cross-check ... flag as instrumentation_artifact: operator_dev_key)
_meta.runtime_source_note: The RUNTIME image ships dist/, not audits/, so the LIVE source consumed by the scoreboard is src/lib/x402-operator-wallets.ts. This JSON is the documented, greppable, extensible mirror; tests/x402-operator-wallets.test.ts asserts the two never drift. To exclude a new operator/dev wallet, add it (lowercased) to BOTH.

wallet_labels.0x76de895fdd3f7b5814eb59ccd244b06b47d8c7: x402 self-settle harness buyer (operator-funded; lists Bazaar/okx routes by settling through them)

match_rule: Lowercase-normalize both sides. A processed_x402_payments.payer_wallet in operator_wallets is EXCLUDED from the distinct-paying-wallet CONVERSION count (agent funnel + x402 census). Addresses are on-chain-public but INTERNAL-ONLY in our surfaces (truncated operator display 0x76de...c755; NEVER published in public copy or a public endpoint).
